rulings.Case Title: SAMETC, LLC et al VS. TED AND PAULINE ELMS et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 30, 2020 line 1. PETITIONER SAMETC, LLC Notice Of Continued Hearing is GRANTED in part and remanded in part. The Court finds that the decision and the judgment thereon contained a temporary bar on ownership based on then-existing circumstances. See Final Award and Multiple Issues Order. The matter is remanded to the arbitrator to decide whether the same or other circumstances exist for the bar on ownership to be maintained or dissolved. These issues might have been previously addressed by the arbitrator, however, it might have been premature, and the arbitrator shall revisit, if necessary, the issues or make a determination based on the facts as have been previously presented in light of this determination. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing On Amended Petition By Reginald Hindley To Modify Or Vacate Arbitration Award Of October 15, 2019
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 30, 2020 line 2. PETITIONER REGINALD HINDLEY Amended Notice Of Hearing On Amended Petition By Reginald Hindley To Modify Or Vacate Arbitration Award Of October 15, 2019 is OFF CALENDAR, to be re-noticed, if necessary and proper, upon final determination by the arbitrator in light of the ruling in action 513720. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 2801 LEAVENWORTH-CANNERY LLC VS. FORT 1 LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 30, 2020 line 9. CROSS DEFENDANT ABDUL FARID MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS Hearing Required. All declarants to be present either in-person or by Zoom. Zoom appearance is encouraged. The Court will provide a Zoom meeting link. To obtain the link, counsel for both sides or unrepresented parties to e-mail Department501ContestTR@sftc.org no later than 5:00 p.m. on October 29, 2020. E-mail subject line must include the case name; the case number and the hearing date. =(501/CFH)
